name: web_fetch tool feedback
about: Report issues with the LLM-driven web_fetch tool (Tiers 0/1/2)
title: "[web_fetch] "
labels: web-fetch, agent-browser
assignees: ''

---

**What was the URL?**
(e.g. `https://example.com/article`)

**What did you ask the LLM to do with it?**
(summarize/scrape/extract/...)

**What did the LLM get back?**
Paste the structured result or the error.

**Expected**
What should have happened?

**Tier used (if known)**
- [ ] Tier 0 (JSON-LD / OpenGraph)
- [ ] Tier 1 (Mozilla Readability)
- [ ] Tier 2 (agent-browser or macOS WKWebView)
- [ ] Unknown

**Tier 2 backend (if applicable)**
- [ ] agent-browser subprocess
- [ ] macOS WKWebView (Pi.app)

**Logs / screenshots**
Attach anything that helps diagnose.
